caption: A man with dark hair and a beard, wearing a dark blazer over a white shirt and a lanyard, stands at a podium delivering a presentation. He is positioned to the left of a large screen that displays a presentation slide against a dark background with geometric patterns. The slide title reads "TODAY: INDUSTRY-READY ML" and includes the text "Overview & caveats in scaling data pipelines," "Airflow components (Celery, ML models, etc.)," "Introducing difference between ML & Data Pipelines," "Overview of Airflow + Usecase," and "THE BIG PICTURE." Some lines are struck through. At the bottom of the screen, the "europython" logo is visible next to the text "Edinburgh 23-29 July 2018." Throughout the sequence, the man remains in place, shifting his posture slightly as he speaks, while the visual content on the screen and the background remain constant.
